name: reconstruction_ninapro_db1_seed42_v1
purpose: Acquire and verify the public NinaPro DB1 preprocessed subject archives used by the CUDA seed-42 reconstruction screen; never a paper-reproduction input claim.

parameter_provenance.adapter_form: PAPER_SPECIFIED: manuscript lines 636-646; implementation details remain source-traceable only

limitations: The manuscript does not establish these public archive bytes or the repository adapter's exact segmentation as the original paper input.
Output from this manifest is RECONSTRUCTION_INPUT_ONLY and may only support reconstruction-screening results.
